languages.original_text: "A combination of factors, I am inclined to believe. The failing of narrow-mindedness is characteristic of many Magi and Archmagi, leading to unpredictable and, alas, unfortunate consequences. I hope on this occasion, esteemed colleague, will not succumb to it."

languages.text: "Сочетание факторов, как я склонен полагать. Изъян узости мышления присущ многим магосам и архимагосам, что приводит к непредсказуемым и, увы, печальным последствиям. Надеюсь, ты, досточтимый коллега, на сей раз не поддашься ему".

"A combination of factors, I am inclined to believe. The failing of narrow-mindedness is a characteristic of many Magi and Archmagi, leading to unpredictable and, alas, unfortunate consequences. I hope on this occasion, esteemed colleague, will not succumb to it."
languages.original_text: "Сочетание факторов, как я склонен полагать. Изъян узости мышления присущ многим магосам и архимагосам, что приводит к непредсказуемым и, увы, печальным последствиям. Надеюсь, ты, досточтимый коллега, на сей раз не поддашься ему".

traits.locale_text: "A combination of factors, I am inclined to believe. The failing of narrow-mindedness is characteristic of many Magi and Archmagi, leading to unpredictable and, alas, unfortunate consequences. I hope on this occasion, esteemed colleague, will not succumb to it."

"A combination of factors, I am inclined to believe. The failing of narrow-mindedness is characteristic of many Magi and Archmagi, leading to unpredictable and, alas, unfortunate consequences. I hope on this occasion, esteemed colleague, will not succumb to it."

"A combination of factors, I am inclined to believe. The failing of narrow-mindedness is characteristic of many Magi and Archmagi, leading to unpredictable and, alas, unfortunate consequences. I hope on this occasion, esteemed colleague, will not succumb to it."

languages.text: «Aquí hay en juego una combinación de factores, creo. El fallo de la estrechez de miras es propio de numerosos magos y archimagos, y habitualmente conduce a consecuencias impredecibles y lamentables. Estimado colega, espero que no sucumba a él en esta ocasión».
languages.original_text: "A combination of factors, I am inclined to believe. The failing of narrow-mindedness is characteristic of many Magi and Archmagi, leading to unpredictable and, alas, unfortunate consequences. I hope on this occasion, esteemed colleague, will not succumb to it."

traits.locale_text: «Aquí hay en juego una combinación de factores, creo. El fallo de la estrechez de miras es propio de numerosos magos y archimagos, y habitualmente conduce a consecuencias impredecibles y lamentables. Estimado colega, espero que no sucumba a él en esta ocasión».

languages.text: 「複数の要因の組み合わせだろうと、私は考えています。視野の狭さという欠点は、多くのマギやアーキマギに特徴的なもので、予測不能な、そして残念ながら不幸な結果を招きます。今回ばかりは、尊敬する同僚が、それに屈しないことを願っています」
languages.original_text: "A combination of factors, I am inclined to believe. The failing of narrow-mindedness is characteristic of many Magi and Archmagi, leading to unpredictable and, alas, unfortunate consequences. I hope on this occasion, esteemed colleague, will not succumb to it."

traits.locale_text: 「複数の要因の組み合わせだろうと、私は考えています。視野の狭さという欠点は、多くのマギやアーキマギに特徴的なもので、予測不能な、そして残念ながら不幸な結果を招きます。今回ばかりは、尊敬する同僚が、それに屈しないことを願っています」

languages.text: “我倾向认为：这是多种因素共同作用的结果。心胸狭隘是许多贤者和大贤者共有的缺陷特征，往往会导致难以预料且不幸的后果。尊敬的同僚，我希望这次你不会重蹈覆辙。”
languages.original_text: "A combination of factors, I am inclined to believe. The failing of narrow-mindedness is characteristic of many Magi and Archmagi, leading to unpredictable and, alas, unfortunate consequences. I hope on this occasion, esteemed colleague, will not succumb to it."

traits.locale_text: “我倾向认为：这是多种因素共同作用的结果。心胸狭隘是许多贤者和大贤者共有的缺陷特征，往往会导致难以预料且不幸的后果。尊敬的同僚，我希望这次你不会重蹈覆辙。”

languages.text: "Eine Kombination von Faktoren, möchte ich meinen. Engstirnigkeit ist eine Eigenschaft vieler Magi und Erzmagi, die unvorhersehbare und leider unerfreuliche Konsequenzen nach sich zieht. Ich hoffe, geschätzter Kollege, Ihr verfallt Ihr nicht."
languages.original_text: "A combination of factors, I am inclined to believe. The failing of narrow-mindedness is characteristic of many Magi and Archmagi, leading to unpredictable and, alas, unfortunate consequences. I hope on this occasion, esteemed colleague, will not succumb to it."

traits.locale_text: "Eine Kombination von Faktoren, möchte ich meinen. Engstirnigkeit ist eine Eigenschaft vieler Magi und Erzmagi, die unvorhersehbare und leider unerfreuliche Konsequenzen nach sich zieht. Ich hoffe, geschätzter Kollege, Ihr verfallt Ihr nicht."

languages.text: « Une combinaison de facteurs, j'imagine. L'étroitesse d'esprit des magos et archimagos mène bien souvent à des conséquences aussi imprévisibles que malheureuses. J'espère que cette fois, nous y échapperons, honorable collègue. »
languages.original_text: "A combination of factors, I am inclined to believe. The failing of narrow-mindedness is characteristic of many Magi and Archmagi, leading to unpredictable and, alas, unfortunate consequences. I hope on this occasion, esteemed colleague, will not succumb to it."

traits.locale_text: « Une combinaison de facteurs, j'imagine. L'étroitesse d'esprit des magos et archimagos mène bien souvent à des conséquences aussi imprévisibles que malheureuses. J'espère que cette fois, nous y échapperons, honorable collègue.

languages.text: "Faktörlerin bir bileşimi olduğuna inanma eğilimindeyim. Dar görüşlülük başarısızlığı, birçok Magos ve Başmagos'un karakteristiğidir. Tahmin edilemez ve ne yazık ki talihsiz sonuçlara yol açar. Umarım saygıdeğer meslektaşım bu durumda buna yenik düşmez."
languages.original_text: "A combination of factors, I am inclined to believe. The failing of narrow-mindedness is characteristic of many Magi and Archmagi, leading to unpredictable and, alas, unfortunate consequences. I hope on this occasion, esteemed colleague, will not succumb to it."

traits.locale_text: "Faktörlerin bir bileşimi olduğuna inanma eğilimindeyim. Dar görüşlülük başarısızlığı, birçok Magos ve Başmagos'un karakteristiğidir. Tahmin edilemez ve ne yazık ki talihsiz sonuçlara yol açar. Umarım saygıdeğer meslektaşım bu durumda buna yenik düşmez."
